No Poverty.reason: The course content focuses on historical philosophical thought and does not include any explicit or implicit evidence related to poverty eradication or economic resources.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content focuses on historical philosophical thought and does not include any explicit or implicit evidence related to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to provide 'positive life inspiration and enlightenment' and 'enrich life cultivation' through philosophical understanding, which directly contributes to mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). Its objectives to foster 'basic professional understanding,' 'acceptance of diverse ideas,' and 'judgment ability on thought issues' strongly align with Target 4.7.
